assessmentQuestionVersion.name: DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC PROCEDURES
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:
  • Arthrocentesis
  • Urethral catheterization
  • Nail trephination
  • Incision and drainage of abscesses
  • Slit lamp exam
  • Preliminary plain film interpretations
  • Ocular tonometry
  • Local anesthesia
  • Digital anesthesia block
  • Trigger point injection
  • Foreign body removal from superficial site or readily accessible body cavities
